title: Pharmacy Technician
description: UCSF Health is expanding its remote pharmacy operations and seeking a Pharmacy Technician to support our mail-order and telehealth prescription services. You will compound medications, verify prescriptions, manage medication inventory systems, and ensure compliance with state pharmacy regulations. Working remotely, you'll be part of a mission-driven healthcare organization serving patients across California and beyond.
responsibilities: Prepare and compound medications according to pharmacist-verified prescriptions
Verify patient information and insurance coverage in pharmacy management systems
Label medications and prepare packaging for mail distribution
Monitor pharmacy inventory and flag items requiring reorder
Process refill requests and coordinate with patient services teams
Maintain detailed records for DEA compliance and regulatory audits

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; pharmacy technician program completion or in-progress
skills: Attention to detail in patient safety-critical work
certifications: California Pharmacy Technician License (or eligible to obtain)

benefits: Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, and vision
Tuition reimbursement for pharmacy technician certification and continuing education
Flexible schedule with remote-first work environment
Employee wellness programs and mental health resources
